params.accept: True = submission is valid, False = submission is rejected

challengeSubmission(uint256).details: Challenger must stake 5% of bounty. Requires Mass > JURY_MASS_THRESHOLD.

params._usdc: USDC token address on Base L2

returns._0: payloadId The unique identifier of the created payload
The Challenge struct with jury composition and vote counts
The Payload struct with all fields

registerAsJuror(uint256).details: Requires Mass > JURY_MASS_THRESHOLD. Juror stakes 0.5% micro-bond.      V3 anti-collusion: cannot be solver, challenger, or recent juror

params.payloadId: The payload with an expired lock

revealTier1(uint256,bytes,bytes32).details: Verifies: keccak256(solution || secret) == commitHash      AND keccak256(solution) matches membrane rules      Instant USDC payout on success

params.secret: The agent's secret used in the commit hash
The agent's secret for commit verification

sunsetCoreContributorTax().details: V3 spec: triggers when treasury reaches $5M USDC (CPI-adjusted)      Called by governance or automated oracle check

updatePayoutRatios(uint16,uint16,uint16).details: Must sum to 10000 bps. Called via Gravitational Staking governance.

CHALLENGE_BOND_BPS().notice: Challenge bond as % of bounty in bps (V3 spec: 500 = 5%)

CORE_CONTRIBUTOR_BPS().notice: Core contributor tax share in bps (V3 spec: 100 = 1% of total,          which is 1/5 of the 5% metabolic tax)

ESCROW_SMALL().notice: Tier 2 escrow durations by bounty size (V3 spec)

JUROR_BOND_BPS().notice: Juror micro-bond as % of bounty in bps (V3 spec: 50 = 0.5%)

JUROR_FEE_BPS().notice: Juror compensation in bps per juror (V3 spec: 50 = 0.5%)

JURY_MAJORITY().notice: Votes needed for majority (V3 spec: 3 of 5)

JURY_SIZE().notice: Number of jurors for Tier 2 (V3 spec: 5)

METABOLIC_TAX_BPS().notice: Metabolic Tax rate in basis points (V3 spec: 500 = 5%)

castJuryVote(uint256,bool).notice: Cast a jury vote (Accept or Reject the submission)

challengeSubmission(uint256).notice: Challenge a Tier 2 submission during the escrow window

commitClaim(uint256,bytes32).notice: Commit: Agent claims a payload by broadcasting a hash

coreContributorTaxSunset().notice: Whether the core contributor tax has been sunset

createPayload(uint256,uint8,uint8,bytes3.notice: Create a new Metabolic Payload with USDC escrow

finalizeTier2(uint256).notice: Finalize a Tier 2 submission after escrow expires without challenge

getChallenge(uint256).notice: Get the challenge state for a Tier 2 disputed payload

getPayload(uint256).notice: Get the full on-chain state of a payload

pause().notice: Emergency pause — halts all payload creation, commits, and reveals

payoutRatios().notice: Dynamic payout ratios (V3 spec: adjustable via governance)

registerAsJuror(uint256).notice: Register as a juror for a challenged payload

releaseExpiredClaim(uint256).notice: Release an expired commit lock, returning payload to the swarm

revealTier1(uint256,bytes,bytes32).notice: Reveal and verify a Tier 1 (deterministic) solution

revealTier2(uint256,bytes,bytes32).notice: Submit a Tier 2 solution (enters temporal escrow)

routingPath(uint256,uint256).notice: Routing node registry for Proof of Conduit payments

setRoutingPath(uint256,address[]).notice: Register routing path for conduit payouts
